groups.title: Training Curriculum: Introduction
groups.summary: Authored curriculum index (not a transcript): the Introduction phase = 2 lessons (What Is Affiliate Arbitrage?, Understand the System).

groups.title: Training Curriculum: Phase 1 — Build
groups.summary: Authored curriculum index: Phase 1 — Build = 12 lessons (network/offer selection, creative assets, compliance, Flexy/DIYTrax/MetricMover setup, go live).
groups.proposedTitle: Training Curriculum: Phase 1 — Build

groups.title: Training Curriculum: Phase 2 — Test
groups.summary: Authored curriculum index: Phase 2 — Test = 6 lessons (round 1 headline, round 2 visual, round 3 placement, with between-round prep).
groups.proposedTitle: Training Curriculum: Phase 2 — Test

groups.title: Training Curriculum: Phase 3 — Scale
groups.summary: Authored curriculum index: Phase 3 — Scale = 3 lessons (increase budget on top placement, test new placements/publishers, master publisher).
groups.proposedTitle: Training Curriculum: Phase 3 — Scale
